case_title: GOSAN INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT et al vs. TEH, KIMHOE GARY et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND ENTRY OF DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE, RESPONSIVE PLEADING WERE ON FILE PRIOR TO ENTRY OF DEFAULT - GRANTED - DEPT. 6 - QUIDACHAY. THIS IS NOT A STIP. & ORDER, BUT, A ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. DEFAULT OF MAY-25-1994 SET ASIDE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOSAN INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT HU, GORDON COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DECLARATION RE ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOSAN INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT HU, GORDON

JUDGE CHOPPELAS, M. BRADY, REPORTER. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION, TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT RECITED ON THE RECORD BY DEFT'S COUNSEL. DEFT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE STIP.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOSAN INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT HU, GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT TEH, KIMHOE GARY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOSAN INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT HU, GORDON SERVED MAY-18-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEH, KIMHOE GARY
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT TEH, KIMHOE GARY HEARING SET FOR JUN-15-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOSAN INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT HU, GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT TEH, KIMHOE GARY
OPPOSITION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT; P/A FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOSAN INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT HU, GORDON

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUN-15-1994, OVERRULED 5 DAYS TO ANSWER; SANCTIONS - DENIED. ENTRY OF DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE BECAUSE RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS WERE ON FILE PRIOR TO ENTRY OF DEFAULT.
ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT, DENYING DEMURRER SEE DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
